final:
module counter(
    input clock,
    input reset,
    output reg [1:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clock or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 2'b00;
        end
        else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
